/usr/bin/cc -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/modernjvs.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/modernjvs.dir/src/modernjvs.c.o CMakeFiles/modernjvs.dir/src/console/cli.c.o CMakeFiles/modernjvs.dir/src/console/config.c.o CMakeFiles/modernjvs.dir/src/console/debug.c.o CMakeFiles/modernjvs.dir/src/console/watchdog.c.o CMakeFiles/modernjvs.dir/src/controller/input.c.o CMakeFiles/modernjvs.dir/src/controller/threading.c.o CMakeFiles/modernjvs.dir/src/ffb/ffb.c.o CMakeFiles/modernjvs.dir/src/hardware/device.c.o CMakeFiles/modernjvs.dir/src/jvs/io.c.o CMakeFiles/modernjvs.dir/src/jvs/jvs.c.o -o modernjvs  -lm -lgpiod
